verses.text: The day of the Lord comes 'as a thief in the night'; when they say Peace, sudden destruction comes. Unexpected. The day surprises the careless world.
The day of the Lord comes 'as a thief in the night'; when they say Peace, sudden destruction comes. Unexpected. The day surprises the careless world.
The day of the Lord comes 'as a thief in the night'; when they say Peace, sudden destruction comes. Unexpected. The day surprises the careless world.
Ye are not in darkness; 'ye are all the children of light, and... of the day.' Children of light. The believer is not overtaken as others.
Ye are not in darkness; 'ye are all the children of light, and... of the day.' Children of light. The believer is not overtaken as others.
Let us not sleep, but 'watch and be sober,' putting on the breastplate of faith and love. Stay awake. Watchfulness and faith arm the soul.
Let us not sleep, but 'watch and be sober,' putting on the breastplate of faith and love. Stay awake. Watchfulness and faith arm the soul.
Let us not sleep, but 'watch and be sober,' putting on the breastplate of faith and love. Stay awake. Watchfulness and faith arm the soul.
God hath appointed us to salvation; 'comfort yourselves together, and edify one another.' Mutual comfort. Saints build up one another in hope.
God hath appointed us to salvation; 'comfort yourselves together, and edify one another.' Mutual comfort. Saints build up one another in hope.
God hath appointed us to salvation; 'comfort yourselves together, and edify one another.' Mutual comfort. Saints build up one another in hope.
Know them which labour among you, 'and... esteem them very highly in love'; be at peace. Honour leaders. Love and peace mark the church.
Know them which labour among you, 'and... esteem them very highly in love'; be at peace. Honour leaders. Love and peace mark the church.
Warn the unruly, comfort the feebleminded, support the weak; 'follow that which is good.' Pastoral care. Each kind of soul needs its own help.
Warn the unruly, comfort the feebleminded, support the weak; 'follow that which is good.' Pastoral care. Each kind of soul needs its own help.
'Rejoice evermore. Pray without ceasing. In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God.' Three rules. Joy, prayer, and thanks are God's will for us.
'Rejoice evermore. Pray without ceasing. In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God.' Three rules. Joy, prayer, and thanks are God's will for us.
'Rejoice evermore. Pray without ceasing. In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God.' Three rules. Joy, prayer, and thanks are God's will for us.
Quench not the Spirit; despise not prophesyings; 'prove all things'; abstain from all appearance of evil. Discern. Hold the good and shun all evil.
Quench not the Spirit; despise not prophesyings; 'prove all things'; abstain from all appearance of evil. Discern. Hold the good and shun all evil.
Quench not the Spirit; despise not prophesyings; 'prove all things'; abstain from all appearance of evil. Discern. Hold the good and shun all evil.
Quench not the Spirit; despise not prophesyings; 'prove all things'; abstain from all appearance of evil. Discern. Hold the good and shun all evil.
The God of peace sanctify you wholly; 'faithful is he that calleth you, who also will do it.' Sure keeping. God who calls will Himself complete the work.
The God of peace sanctify you wholly; 'faithful is he that calleth you, who also will do it.' Sure keeping. God who calls will Himself complete the work.
Pray for us; greet the brethren; the grace of the Lord be with you. Closing. He ends with prayer and grace.
Pray for us; greet the brethren; the grace of the Lord be with you. Closing. He ends with prayer and grace.
